Interface Request

public interface Request
Interface to prepare and execute an HTTP request.

    • getResponseContentEncoding

      String getResponseContentEncoding()
      Returns the content encoding of the response entity, or null if the content is not encoded (or has already been decoded by the HTTP client library).

      Starting with HttpClient 5.6, ContentCompressionExec decompresses gzip/deflate responses but no longer removes the Content-Encoding response header. Callers should use this method instead of getResponseHeader("Content-Encoding") to avoid double decompression. See AXIS2-6101.

    • releaseConnection

      void releaseConnection()
